# Asset Credits & Licenses

Every asset committed to this repo MUST have an entry here recording source and
license. We ship commercially, so only CC0 / public-domain / self-generated
assets are permitted. No exceptions.

## Art

**None, by design.** Every visual — player, all five enemy types, projectiles,
XP gems, particles, world grid and walls — is drawn procedurally in-engine with
`_draw()` calls. There is no image file in this repository and therefore no art
licence to honour.

## Music

**Generated by `tools/gen_music.py`** — original work, synthesised from scratch.
Deliberately NOT a downloaded CC0 track: shipping commercially means relying on
someone else's licence claim being accurate, and we can avoid that entirely by
authoring the music ourselves.

- **File:** `assets/music/synthwave_loop.ogg`
  **Source:** generated by `tools/gen_music.py` in this repo
  **Author:** this project (original work)
  **License:** owned outright — safe for commercial release
  **Verified:** 2026-07-18 — no sample material, no third-party audio, no
  external track used as input. Every waveform is synthesised from oscillators
  and filtered noise, including the sub and 808 bass. The composition
  (A minor, i–VI–III–VII, 112 BPM) is authored in the generator source.
  **Note:** the intermediate `build/synthwave_loop.wav` is an audition artifact
  and is not committed; only the encoded `.ogg` ships.

## SFX

All ten sounds are **generated by `tools/gen_sfx.py`** — original work created
for this project. No third-party asset, no attribution requirement, no licence
to verify. The generator is fixed-seeded, so re-running it reproduces the same
files byte for byte.

- **Files:** `assets/sfx/{shoot,hit,enemy_death,xp_pickup,level_up,player_hurt,run_over,boss_spawn,boss_death,dash}.wav`
  **Source:** generated by `tools/gen_sfx.py` in this repo
  **Author:** this project (original work)
  **License:** owned outright — safe for commercial release
  **Verified:** 2026-07-18 — synthesised from scratch with the Python standard
  library; no sample material of any kind was used as input.

---

### Template

```
- **File:** assets/path/to/file.ext
  **Source:** <url>
  **Author:** <name>
  **License:** CC0 1.0 / Public Domain
  **Verified:** YYYY-MM-DD by <who> — <where the license was stated>
```
